spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_M00_AXIS_TDATA_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Width of S_AXIS address bus. The slave accepts the read and write addresses of width C_M_AXIS_TDATA_WIDTH.

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_M00_AXIS_START_COUNT
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Start count is the number of clock cycles the master will wait before initiating/issuing any transaction.

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_M00_AXIS_TDATA_WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:description: Width of S_AXIS address bus. The slave accepts the read and write addresses of width C_M_AXIS_TDATA_WIDTH.

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_M00_AXIS_START_COUNT
spirit:parameter.spirit:description: Start count is the number of clock cycles the master will wait before initiating/issuing any transaction.

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: MAXIMUM_SAMPLING_FREQ_HZ
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: Maximum Sampling Frequency of ADC (unit: Hz)
